GYEON Q²M Interior Detailer

Regular price: $21.00 CAD (500ml) / $34.00 CAD (1L) / $110.00 CAD (4L)
Brand: Gyeon

Safe on all surfaces & Matte finish
That's right, all surfaces! Q²M Interior Detailer is the ideal interior maintenance product to remove light grime, contaminants, and leave a fresh and purified interior feel. It's safe on leather, plastic, Alcantara, textiles, glass, LCD touch panels, instrument panels, and all types of interior trim. It will leave a matte and non-sticky finish.

Hygienic. kills 99% of bacteria & germs.
These days, keeping your surroundings clean has a completely new meaning and may decide the health of you and your loved ones. Q²M Interior Detailer has an alcohol-based formula that removes the majority of organic contaminants from any surface. This is especially useful in high-traffic areas such as the steering wheel, shifter, and instrument panels. Kid and pet-friendly.

Quick Interior Detailer
The GYEON Interior Detailer is one of our house favorites; it not only wipes off streak-free (can be used on glass) but also leaves an OEM matte mature finish with no germs left behind. Tested by KTR (Korea Testing & Research Institute) to eliminate 99% of bacteria.

Tip: Since the Interior Detailer does not leave a finish behind, if you're looking for more of a sheen, you can top your dash with GYEON Preserve.

GYEON Q²M Interior Detailer 500ml

STRONG HYGIENIC ACTION WHILE REMOVING DAILY CONTAMINANTS FOR A PURE AND CLEAN SURFACE.

These days keeping your surroundings clean has a completely new meaning and may decide about the health of you and your loved ones. Q²M InteriorDetailer has an alcohol-based formula (60%), which removes the majority of organic contaminants from any surface. Q²M InteriorDetailer does not replace Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M Leather Cleaner, but compliments them.

QUICK DETAILER FOR YOUR INTERIOR

Q²M InteriorDetailer is the ideal interior maintenance product, to remove light grime, contaminants and leave a fresh and purify interior feel. It's safe on leather, plastic, Alcantara, textiles, glass and all types of interior trim. It will leave a matte and not sticky finish.

FAQ:

What's the difference between Interior and Leather Cleaner?
GYEON Interior Detailer is for light touch-ups, able to tackle makeup, sunscreen, and coffee spills. However, for a thorough cleaning, you'll need a stronger chemical, such as GYEON Leather Cleaner Strong or Mild.

Difference between Interior Detailer and Vinyl Cleaner?
GYEON's Vinyl Cleaner, with a pH of 9, is highly effective against etched stains and glue residues. We recommend using GYEON Vinyl Cleaner for a deep clean, followed by Interior Detailer for maintenance. There's no need to consistently use a strong chemical for weekly cleaning.

Does it leave any protection behind?
No, it does not. It's recommended to protect your leather with GYEON Leather Coat or Leather Shield and use GYEON Preserve for dashboards.

Anything I should be aware of?
This is great for cleaning around the house as well, as it leaves no chemical residues behind. By the way, if you have stainless appliances, you'll know how difficult it is to clean them without any streaks. GYEON Interior Detailer is the only product that we've found to work flawlessly when it comes to cleaning stainless appliances.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer | Interior Cleaner & Hygiene Spray - Esoteric Car Care
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer

Regular price $18.95

In stock, ready to ship

Safe, Effective Interior Cleaning for Everyday Use

Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer is designed for regular interior cleaning and hygiene across all modern vehicle interior surfaces. Its alcohol-based formula effectively removes light grime, organic contaminants, and fingerprints while leaving a clean, natural matte finish.

With a 60% alcohol content, Q²M Interior Detailer helps reduce contamination on frequently touched surfaces without leaving residue or altering the look or feel of leather, plastics, Alcantara, textiles, or interior glass.

This product is ideal for maintaining a fresh interior appearance between deep cleanings and is safe for use on coated and uncoated surfaces alike.

Interior Surfaces Made Easy

Q²M Interior Detailer lifts dirt and oils while preserving factory finishes. It will not leave greasy buildup, streaking, or shine, making it a trusted solution for professional detailers and enthusiasts alike.

How to Use

- Spray onto a high-quality microfiber towel
- Wipe the surface evenly
- Flip towel to a dry side and lightly buff if needed

For best results, use with a premium microfiber towel such as the Gyeon PolishWipe EVO.

Professional Interior Maintenance, Simplified

At Esoteric, we recommend Q²M Interior Detailer as a reliable, everyday interior cleaner that balances effective hygiene with surface safety. It's a staple product for maintaining clean interiors without compromise.

Application Information

Spray directly onto a microfiber towel and gently wipe the surface. Do not oversaturate interior materials. Follow with a dry towel if needed.

Surface Compatibility

Safe for leather, plastic, vinyl, Alcantara, textiles, interior glass, and trim. Leaves a clean, matte finish with no residue.

Esoteric Recommendation

Trusted by Esoteric as a go-to interior maintenance product for routine cleaning and hygiene without altering factory finishes.

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer 500 mL

Brand: GYEON Quartz
Price: $17.99
In stock - Usually ships within 1-2 business days
SKU: GY-8056

Features:
- Safe for use on a variety of interior surfaces.

- Cleans, purifies, and maintains your interior without needing multiple products.

Specifications

SKU(s): GY-8056
Product Form: Liquid
Applicable Finishes: plastic, textiles, glass, interior trim, leather, Alcantara

Why Buy?

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer promotes strong hygienic action, while still removing daily contaminants for a pure and super clean surface. Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer uses an alcohol-based formula to remove organic contaminants and leave a safer and more hygienic surface for you and your fellow passengers. Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer is safe to use on a variety of interior surfaces, and will not leave a sticky finish.

How to Use

- Clean the surface with a dedicated product, like Q2M Leather Cleaner or Q2M Vinyl Cleaner.
- Remove excess of product and let dry.
- Spray Q2M Interior Detailer on a low pile microfiber towel.
- Carefully wipe all panels inside your car.

Never leave a soaked microfiber on any surface.

Product Description

Interior detailing for the final touch!

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer promotes strong hygienic action, while still removing daily contaminants for a pure and super clean surface. Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer uses an alcohol-based formula to remove organic contaminants and leave a safer and more hygienic surface for you and your fellow passengers. Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer is safe to use on a variety of interior surfaces, and will not leave a sticky finish.

Germs these days are running rampant and we need to do our best to keep things clean and hygienic as much as we can. But it can be time consuming to use one product to clean, another one to protect and another one to purify. But with Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer you get all this in one.

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer doesn't replace the need for other cleaners like the Q2M Vinyl Cleaner or the Q2M Leather Cleaner, but instead compliments them and even improves them. Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer is made of 60% alcohol-based formula which is uniquely formulated to remove the majority of organic contaminants from any surface. It's the ideal product to maintain your interior and keep it purified for you and your passengers.

Best of all, Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer is safe to use practically all interior surfaces. Feel free to use Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer to maintain a healthy clean on plastic, textiles, glass, interior trim, leather and even Alcantara! Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer will leave behind a matte finish, rather than a sticky one.

500 ml. (16.9 oz.)

Proposition 65 Warning for California Consumers

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer

Brand: Gyeon
Size options: 500ml - £14.00 / 1L - £24.00 / 4L - £71.00
VAT included
Stock: In stock

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer Overview

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer is a fast-acting, alcohol-based interior cleaner designed to remove light grime, organic contaminants and everyday residues from all cabin surfaces. With a 60% alcohol formula, it helps maintain a clean and hygienic environment—an increasingly important part of modern vehicle care for both you and your family.

While it does not replace dedicated cleaners like Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M LeatherCleaner, it perfectly complements them as a day-to-day maintenance product. It refreshes surfaces with a purified, matte, non-sticky finish, making it ideal for quick interior clean-ups.

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer Key Benefits

- Alcohol-Based Formula (60%) – Removes most organic contaminants quickly and effectively.
- Safe on All Interior Materials – Suitable for leather, plastic, glass, Alcantara, textiles and trim.
- Perfect for Daily Maintenance – Ideal for light cleaning between deep-clean cycles.
- Leaves a Fresh Matte Finish – Non-sticky, streak-free and factory correct.
- Complements Deep Cleaners – Use alongside Q²M VinylCleaner and Q²M LeatherCleaner for full care.

Gyeon Q2M Interior Detailer Ideal Uses

- Quick interior refreshes
- Removing fingerprints, smudges and light dust
- Maintaining a hygienic cabin between deep cleans
